articles.title_en: Russian Navy patents unmanned rescue towing boat
articles.lead_en: The developers specify that the uncrewed boat is designed to deliver the PSN-20 inflatable life raft to the site of an accident in a folded state, tow small surface objects to the site of an accident
articles.title_raw: Russian Navy patents unmanned rescue towing boat
articles.lead_raw: The developers specify that the uncrewed boat is designed to deliver the PSN-20 inflatable life raft to the site of an accident in a folded state, tow small surface objects to the site of an accident
